entries.spanish: Quise viajar a Perú el año pasado.
entries.english: I wanted to travel to Peru last year.
Did you want to order the fish?

entries.spanish: Mi mamá quiso limpiar la casa antes de la visita.
entries.english: My mom wanted to clean the house before the visit.

entries.spanish: Quisimos ir al servicio el domingo, pero llovió.
entries.english: We wanted to go to the service on Sunday, but it rained.

entries.spanish: Mis abuelos quisieron vernos en Navidad.
entries.english: My grandparents wanted to see us at Christmas.

entries.spanish: Mi perro quiso jugar en el parque toda la tarde.
entries.english: My dog wanted to play at the park all afternoon.

entries.spanish: Los estudiantes quisieron más tiempo para el examen.
entries.english: The students wanted more time for the exam.

entries.spanish: El doctor quiso hacerme más exámenes.
entries.english: The doctor wanted to run more tests on me.

entries.spanish: Mi jefe quiso tener una reunión el viernes.
entries.english: My boss wanted to have a meeting on Friday.

entries.spanish: Quise aprender a tocar la guitarra el año pasado.
entries.english: I wanted to learn to play the guitar last year.
Will you want to visit Mexico again?

entries.spanish: Querremos llevar a los niños a la iglesia.
entries.english: We will want to take the children to church.
Will you all want a table outside?

entries.spanish: Ella querrá descansar cuando llegue a casa.
entries.english: She will want to rest when she gets home.

entries.spanish: Mis papás querrán saber cómo nos fue.
entries.english: My parents will want to know how it went for us.

entries.spanish: El perro querrá comer cuando lleguemos.
entries.english: The dog will want to eat when we get home.

entries.spanish: Los estudiantes querrán un descanso después del examen.
entries.english: The students will want a break after the exam.

entries.spanish: El médico querrá ver los resultados mañana.
entries.english: The doctor will want to see the results tomorrow.
Will you want to work extra hours this week?

entries.spanish: Querremos ir a acampar este verano.
entries.english: We will want to go camping this summer.
I want to travel to Costa Rica.
Do you want to go to the airport with me?

entries.spanish: Mis papás quieren visitar a la familia en Colombia.
entries.english: My parents want to visit family in Colombia.

entries.spanish: Quiero pedir la sopa de pollo.
entries.english: I want to order the chicken soup.
What do you want to eat tonight?

entries.spanish: Ellos quieren una mesa para cuatro personas.
entries.english: They want a table for four people.
I want to clean the house today.
Do you want to help me in the kitchen?
I love you so much, Mom.

entries.spanish: Mi abuela quiere vernos este fin de semana.
entries.english: My grandmother wants to see us this weekend.

entries.spanish: Queremos tener más tiempo con la familia.
entries.english: We want to have more time with family.
My cat wants to go outside.
Do you want to adopt a dog?

entries.spanish: Quiero sacar buenas notas este semestre.
entries.english: I want to get good grades this semester.
What do you want to study in college?

entries.spanish: Los estudiantes quieren más tiempo para el proyecto.
entries.english: The students want more time for the project.
I want to eat healthier.

entries.spanish: El doctor quiere hacerme unos exámenes.
entries.english: The doctor wants to run some tests on me.
I want to ask for a raise.
When do you want to have the meeting?

entries.spanish: Quiero aprender a tocar la guitarra.
entries.english: I want to learn to play the guitar.

entries.spanish: ¿Quieres ir al parque este fin de semana?
entries.english: Do you want to go to the park this weekend?

entries.spanish: Queremos aprender más sobre la Biblia.
entries.english: We want to learn more about the Bible.

entries.spanish: Ellos quieren unirse al equipo de fútbol.
entries.english: They want to join the soccer team.
